name: Config Validate Command

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Config Validate Command is complete and correct

scope: Add a wolfcastle config validate command for standalone config checking without starting the daemon. Loads the three-tier config, runs ValidateStructure, reports errors and warnings, exits with appropriate code (0 for clean, non-zero for errors). Useful for CI and pre-commit hooks. See the existing validate package and three-tier config loading in internal/config.
success_criteria: 'wolfcastle config validate' runs successfully against a valid config and exits 0
'wolfcastle config validate' reports errors and exits non-zero for invalid configs
'wolfcastle config validate --json' produces structured output suitable for CI consumption
Test coverage on new code exceeds 90%

breadcrumbs.text: Created 1 leaf child: config-validate-implementation (3 tasks: command implementation, tests, CLI docs). Single leaf is sufficient because all validation logic already exists in internal/config/validate.go — this is pure CLI wiring with no new interfaces or contracts needed. Tasks ordered: implementation first, tests second, docs third.
